2605.07111.title: Beyond LoRA vs. Full Fine-Tuning: Gradient-Guided Optimizer Routing for LLM Adaptation
2605.07111.paper_summary: Recent literature on fine-tuning Large Language Models highlights a fundamental debate. While Full Fine-Tuning (FFT) provides the representational plasticity required for high-entropy knowledge injection, Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) can match or surpass FFT performance because many tasks only require updates in a low-rank space and benefit from LoRA's additional regularization. Through empirical evaluation across diverse tasks (SQL, Medical QA, and Counterfactual Knowledge) and varying language models (Gemma-3-1B, Qwen2.5-1.5B, and Qwen2.5-3B), we verify both trends and demonstrate that relying solely on either static architecture is structurally limited. To address this challenge, we propose a Mixture of LoRA and Full (MoLF) Fine-Tuning, a unified framework that enables continuous navigation between both training regimes. MoLF dynamically routes updates between FFT and LoRA at the optimizer level to ensure that exact gradient signals are available to both experts throughout training, yielding stable training dynamics. For memory-constrained environments, we also introduce MoLF-Efficient, which freezes base weights and only routes updates among a pair of LoRA experts of potentially varying rank. Our evaluations show that MoLF either improves on or stays within $1.5\%$ of the better of FFT and LoRA across all settings, while MoLF-Efficient outperforms prior adaptive LoRA approaches by up to $20\%$ on Fact and $9\%$ on Med and SQL.
2605.07111.paper_summary_zh: 最近關於微調大型語言模型的文獻突顯了一個根本性辯論。<lb/>雖然完全微調（FFT）提供了高熵知識注入所需的表徵可塑性，但低秩適應（LoRA）可以匹配或超越FFT的性能，因為許多任務只需要在低秩空間中進行更新，並受益於LoRA的額外正則化。<lb/>通過對多樣化任務（SQL、醫療問答和反事實知識）和不同語言模型（Gemma-3-1B、Qwen2.5-1.5B和Qwen2.5-3B）的實證評估，我們驗證了這兩種趨勢，並展示僅依賴任一靜態架構在結構上是有限的。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們提出了一種混合LoRA和完全（MoLF）微調的統一框架，該框架使得在兩種訓練模式之間進行持續導航成為可能。<lb/>MoLF在優化器層面動態路由更新於FFT和LoRA之間，以確保在整個訓練過程中，兩個專家都能獲得精確的梯度信號，從而產生穩定的訓練動態。<lb/>對於內存受限的環境，我們還引入了MoLF-Efficient，該方法凍結基礎權重，並僅在一對潛在不同秩的LoRA專家之間路由更新。<lb/>我們的評估顯示，MoLF在所有設置中要麼改善了，要麼在FFT和LoRA中更好的那一者之內保持在$1.5\%$的範圍內，而MoLF-Efficient在Fact上超越了先前的自適應LoRA方法達到$20\%$，在Med和SQL上達到$9\%$的提升。
2605.07111.author: Haozhan Tang et.al.
2605.07111.authors: Haozhan Tang, Xiuqi Zhu, Xinyin Zhang, Boxun Li, Virginia Smith, Kevin Kuo
